# GDB-Engines

> Compare features across 90+ graph databases, extensions, and query engines. Open source data from academic research.

## About

GDB-Engines is an open source comparison tool for graph databases. It covers property graph databases (LPG), RDF triple stores, multi-model databases, query engines, extensions, and embedded graph libraries.

## Data

- Comparison table: https://gdb-engines.com
- JSON API: https://gdb-engines.com/api.json
- Source data (TOML): https://github.com/cjlm/gdb-engines/tree/main/src/content/databases

## Research Features

43 feature scores sourced from: Coimbra, M. E., Svitakova, L., Francisco, A. P., & Veiga, L. (2025). Survey: Graph Databases. arXiv:2505.24758.

## Categories

- Type: Property Graph (LPG), RDF, Multiple, Other
- Kind: Database, Extension, Query Engine, Embedded
- Category: Established, Enterprise, Growing, Emerging
- Status: Active, Inactive, Deprecated

## Preferred citation

GDB-Engines — Graph Database Comparison. https://gdb-engines.com
